said.quote: Het kabinet werkt structureel toe naar zo'n 100.000 nieuwe woningen per jaar en trekt daar vanaf 2029 jaarlijks één miljard euro voor uit.
said.attribution: Coalitieakkoord 2026-2030 'Aan de slag — Bouwen aan een beter Nederland' (D66, VVD, CDA)

shows.finding: In 2025 the housing stock grew by 79,910 gross dwellings (new construction + conversions), down from 82,204 in 2024 and 87,833 in 2023. That is roughly 20% below the 100,000/year target, and the underlying trend is downward over the last three years.
shows.dataSource: CBS 82235NED (Voorraad woningen; standen en mutaties vanaf 1921), field Woningbouw_5

synthesis: The commitment is to build 20% more per year than was actually delivered the year before the coalition took office — while the observed trend is currently moving in the opposite direction. The €1B/year in extra federal funding only starts in 2029.
